access_token.description: Xero OAuth2 access token. Sent as a Bearer token; never logged.

tenant_id.description: Xero tenant (organisation) id. Sent as the Xero-tenant-id header; never logged. See Known limits: legacy's config-fallback convenience for this value is not modeled.

base_url.description: Xero Accounting API base URL override for tests or proxies.
